event: A woman lying on a bed after a night of drinking
symbols: empty bottles and glass — the aftermath of excess and the emptiness of dissipation
description: A woman lies sprawled across a bed, her body half-turned, one arm hanging over the edge. She wears a white garment and a dark patterned covering. Her dark hair spreads across the white bedding. Her face is turned to one side with an expression of exhaustion or unconsciousness. On a table in the foreground stand two dark bottles and a half-filled glass. The bed has a dark reddish-brown headboard. The palette is muted — browns, whites, dull greens, and warm reds. The brushwork is rough and expressive.
